title: Handle STM32 watchdog setup failure
description: Discovered during review of project-LICHEN-5ix1.5. STM32 wdt_setup enables the non-disableable IWDG before waiting for register update; on setup failure puck clears s_wdt and never starts its feed timer, potentially causing a repeated reset loop. Define and implement fail-safe behavior that preserves diagnostics and does not silently run unprotected.
acceptance_criteria: A simulated watchdog setup failure has explicit deterministic behavior without an accidental silent unprotected state or unexplained reset loop; normal setup/feed remains unchanged; focused tests use independent outcomes.
